sanskrit: नमः पुरस्तादथ पृष्ठतस्ते नमोऽस्तु ते सर्वत एव सर्व। अनन्तवीर्यामितविक्रमस्त्वं सर्वं समाप्नोषि ततोऽसि सर्वः॥
transliteration: namaḥ purastād atha pṛṣṭhatas te namo 'stu te sarvata eva sarva | ananta-vīryām-ita-vikramas tvaṃ sarvaṃ samāpnoṣi tato 'si sarvaḥ ||
literal_meaning: Salutations from the front, from behind, and from every side! O You of infinite power and immeasurable prowess, You pervade everything; therefore You are everything.
contextual_meaning: Arjuna’s ego-boundaries dissolve; he experiences total surrender, perceiving the cosmos as a single, conscious field in which he is included and protected.
psychological_state: Ego-dissolution with preserved observing self—classic mystical union marked by boundless safety and self-transcendence.
trigger_scenario: The moment a person in ICU sees their life-support monitors sync with their heartbeat and realizes every nurse, machine, and breath is one living system keeping them alive.
anchor_text: Feel completely held by the same awareness that holds the stars.
